raw.message:
누구나 쉽고 재미있게 한게임 포커
지금 플레이하고 칩 쓸어 담아가세요

hook.summary: Displays a massive chip win and a card hand with text welcoming beginners.
hook.visual_action: A pile of poker chips totaling 10.5 billion is shown alongside a card hand.

scene_flow: Initial shot of a high-stakes poker win and card hand with beginner-friendly messaging.
Flashy transition with 'RIGHT NOW' text and green light effects.
Logo reveal of Hangame Poker on a classic green felt table.
Final call to action screen offering a 1 billion chip reward for new players.
audience_proxy: Korean adults interested in competitive card games and high-stakes poker simulations.
